title: hieracium subovalifolium
intro: Hieracium subovalifolium, also known as Suboval-leaved Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subovalifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to create remedies for various health conditions.
